prompt: Create a bright, nostalgic 3D cartoon video game scene featuring exactly 3 recognizable characters standing together on a suburban sidewalk: Garfield, an orange striped cat with droopy half-closed eyes and a bored expression on the left; Snoopy, a small white beagle with black ears, black nose, and a red collar in the center; and Charlie Brown, a bald round-headed boy wearing a yellow shirt with a black zigzag stripe, black shorts, yellow socks, and brown shoes on the right. Set them outside a yellow clapboard house with purple trim, an open dark doorway, and a small purple-framed window, with a pale concrete path in the foreground, green lawn, purple picket fence, teal garage-like building, rolling grassy hill, pine trees, one autumn-colored tree, blue sky, and soft white clouds. Use a low-poly early-2000s console-game aesthetic, rounded toy-like proportions, simple smooth materials, saturated colors, slightly exaggerated heads and feet, soft daylight, and a fixed third-person camera angle looking slightly downward at the trio, with all three characters appearing mildly confused or unimpressed.
